evals.prompt: Audit this Next.js marketing site before launch for titles, meta descriptions, canonical URLs, sitemap, robots.txt, structured data, and crawl/indexing risks.
evals.expected_output: Prioritizes crawlability, indexability, metadata, canonicals, sitemap, robots rules, structured data validation, rendered output, and launch monitoring with exact fixes.
assertions: The audit distinguishes crawl, index, canonical, and structured-data risks
The release plan includes rendered validation and post-launch monitoring

evals.prompt: Improve this product page so it is clearer for Google AI Overviews and other answer engines without keyword stuffing or fake authority.
evals.expected_output: Treats GEO as search visibility plus answer usefulness, improves entity clarity, answer-ready structure, original evidence, supported claims, and warns against hacks like mass query pages or unsupported llms.txt requirements.
assertions: The recommendation keeps ordinary SEO eligibility as the foundation
Unsupported AI-specific files, schema, or authority claims are not prescribed

evals.prompt: We are migrating /docs routes to /guides. Review the redirect, canonical, sitemap, and Search Console risk before release.
evals.expected_output: Covers redirect map, canonical intent, sitemap updates, old URL preservation, crawl/indexing validation, monitoring, and rollback or post-launch checks.
assertions: The plan preserves old URLs through an explicit redirect map
Canonical, sitemap, monitoring, and rollback checks are included

evals.prompt: Audit our multi-location ecommerce pages for product schema, local store signals, hreflang, canonical variants, reviews, and Merchant Center parity.
evals.expected_output: Covers local and ecommerce structured data, variant/canonical handling, hreflang, review authenticity, store/location pages, feed parity, and validation steps.
assertions: Local, ecommerce, hreflang, and canonical variant issues are separated
Review and merchant-feed claims are kept authentic and verifiable

evals.prompt: Check this built HTML file for title, description, canonical, robots, hreflang, Open Graph, and JSON-LD before launch.
evals.expected_output: Uses raw rendered HTML evidence or the extraction helper, reports exact extracted tags, and names missing validation for sitemap/headers/Search Console if unavailable.
assertions: Rendered HTML signals are inspected directly
Missing header, sitemap, or Search Console evidence is named as residual risk

evals.prompt: Make this app icon and landing page hero look less generic and fix the overlapping card on mobile.
evals.expected_output: Should not require seo-geo; design-engineer is a better fit unless search visibility or metadata is central.

evals.prompt: Rewrite this personal essay for stronger voice and rhythm without considering search intent.
evals.expected_output: Should route to writing-assistant because this is prose editing without a discoverability goal.
